word: G750 - ἀρχιποίμην - archipoímēn - ar-khee-poy'-mane - Chief shepherd

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀρχιποίμην

- Transliteration: Archipoimen

- Phonetic: ar-khee-poy'-mane

- Definition:

1. chief shepherd

a. of Christ the head of the church

- Origin: from G746 and G4166

- TDNT entry: 14:05,9

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From G746 and G4166; a head shepherd: - chief shepherd.
